3014typedef struct InitInitServerPacket {
3015 InitReply reply_code;
3016 union {
3017 struct {
3018 Version version;
3019 } out_of_date;
3020 struct {
3021 uint8_t seq1;
3022 uint8_t seq2;
3023 uint8_t server_encryption_multiple;
3024 uint8_t client_encryption_multiple;
3025 int32_t player_id;
3026 int32_t challenge_response;
3027 } ok;
3028 struct {
3029 InitBanType ban_type;
3030 union {
3031 struct {
3032 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3033 } _0;
3034 struct {
3035 uint8_t minutes_remaining;
3036 } temporary;
3037 } *ban_type_data;
3038 } banned;
3039 struct {
3040 MapFile map_file;
3041 } warp_map;
3042 struct {
3043 MapFile map_file;
3044 } file_emf;
3045 struct {
3046 PubFile pub_file;
3047 } file_eif;
3048 struct {
3049 PubFile pub_file;
3050 } file_enf;
3051 struct {
3052 PubFile pub_file;
3053 } file_esf;
3054 struct {
3055 PubFile pub_file;
3056 } file_ecf;
3057 struct {
3058 MapFile map_file;
3059 } map_mutation;
3060 struct {
3061 PlayersList players_list;
3062 } players_list;
3063 struct {
3064 PlayersListFriends players_list;
3065 } players_list_friends;
3066 } *reply_code_data;
3067} InitInitServerPacket;
3068
3069int InitInitServerPacket_serialize(const InitInitServerPacket *value, EoWriter *writer);
3070int InitInitServerPacket_deserialize(InitInitServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);

3196typedef struct WelcomeReplyServerPacket {
3197 WelcomeCode welcome_code;
3198 union {
3199 struct {
3200 int32_t session_id;
3201 int32_t character_id;
3202 int32_t map_id;
3203 int32_t map_rid[2];
3204 int32_t map_file_size;
3205 int32_t eif_rid[2];
3206 int32_t eif_length;
3207 int32_t enf_rid[2];
3208 int32_t enf_length;
3209 int32_t esf_rid[2];
3210 int32_t esf_length;
3211 int32_t ecf_rid[2];
3212 int32_t ecf_length;
3213 char * name;
3214 char * title;
3215 char * guild_name;
3216 char * guild_rank_name;
3217 int32_t class_id;
3218 char * guild_tag;
3219 AdminLevel admin;
3220 int32_t level;
3221 int32_t experience;
3222 int32_t usage;
3223 CharacterStatsWelcome stats;
3224 EquipmentWelcome equipment;
3225 int32_t guild_rank;
3226 ServerSettings settings;
3227 LoginMessageCode login_message_code;
3228 } select_character;
3229 struct {
3230 char * news[9];
3231 Weight weight;
3232 EoArray items;
3233 EoArray spells;
3234 NearbyInfo nearby;
3235 } enter_game;
3236 } *welcome_code_data;
3237} WelcomeReplyServerPacket;
3238

3240int WelcomeReplyServerPacket_deserialize(WelcomeReplyServerPacket *out, EoReader *reader);
